item.title: Tramontina enameled cast iron casserole, 24 cm, 20906024
item.description: - 24 cm diameter- capacity: 4 ltips to take care of your tramontina cookware- before using for the first time, wash with a soft sponge and mild soap or detergent - dry your cookware items thoroughly with a soft cloth and store them in a dry and well-ventilated place, away from steam or damp- observe the item when it is being heated and never let the contents dry out as this can cause permanent damage to the enamel- with use, handles may become loose due to the normal dilation of materials. tighten only enough without forcing them- enameled iron is extremely resistant but it can be damaged if it suffers any impact against hard surfaces- apply some cooking oil with a piece of kitchen towel in the affected area for protection or to remove white stains- avoid thermal shock by not soaking a hot utensil in cold water - never use abrasive products to wash it- if burnt food sticks to the pan, soak the area in water and clean with a sponge and mild detergent. after cleaning, apply a thin layer of cooking oil around the rim of the body and lid of your cookware- to discard products and packaging, follow existing recycling guidelines- this product does not require maintenance, only cleaning
item.google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Cookware & Bakeware

item.title: Tramontina stainless steel saute pan, 30 cm, 62820300
item.description: - 30 cm diameter- made of 100% stainless steel- leaves no residue in food so food remains safe- smooth design without edges makes it easy to clean- the triple body (stainless steel, aluminum, stainless steel) heats evenly, provides faster cooking, saves energy, and leaves food soft, flavorful and warm for a longer amount of time- elegant and functional design allows you to take pan directly to the table for serving- safe to use on gas, electric and vitroceramic stoves. it also features a lid with steam vent that fits perfectly- dishwasher safe-healthier as it is made of stainless steel- can be used in the oven to gratin or cook dishes at a maximum temperature of 260c - use low or medium heat to prevent food from sticking to the bottom of the pot- when using the pot on a gas stove, the flame must not go higher than the bottom of the pot. if using the pot on a hot plate, make sure the hot plate is the same diameter or smaller than the pot- to maintain the shine and beauty of your tramontina stainless steel pot, only wash using detergent and sponge- whenever possible, rinse the product with warm water after washing and dry immediately in order to keep its original shine as chloride and other substances contained in water can cause stains - do not place an empty pot on a heat source- stainless steel handles heat up during cooking. wear oven mitts when handling- to remove the tramontina sticker from the pots, wipe with a damp cloth with ethanol and wash after
item.google_product_category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Cookware & Bakeware

item.title: Tramontina 4 pcs barbecue set with case, 66928547
item.description: - stainless steel set, highly durable and maintains original features preserving the material's appearance, hygiene and durability- forks with internally polished tines, perfectly shaped for the mouth, and with round edges for more comfortable use- knifes with fully tempered blades guarantees a more durable cutting edge, greater resistance to corrosion and will not scratch porcelain- dishwasher safedimensions (hxwxd):- table fork edge engraving: 2.1x2.6x20.3 cm- jumbo steak knife: 1.4x2.7x24 cm tips to take care of your tramontina cutlery- use only detergent and a soft sponge to avoid scratches and damage- rinse each item well in order to remove all residue of cleaning products which are abrasive and can damage the stainless steel- use warm water whenever possible as it renews the cutlery shine- after washing, dry the tableware immediately otherwise the chemical substances in water (chlorine) can stain the tableware- avoid rubbing items together during washing and storing to prevent scratches- avoid contact with hot surfaces, they can cause the colors to fade- do not store items in a humid place as it can cause stains- in order to maintain their sharpness all knives of any brand are made with a higher carbon content making them less resistant to corrosion. therefore special attention should be paid to knives since they will be more prone to the aforementioned problemusing the dishwasher :- do not overload the utensils basket. separate the pieces well since prolonged contact during the drying cycle may stain the cutlery- if using a dishwasher, we recommend removing cutlery pieces as soon as the rinse cycle is over and manually dry them
item.google_product_category: Business & Industrial > Food Service > Disposable Tableware > Disposable Cutlery

item.title: Gorenje built in hood, 60 cm, under counter, whu629es/s
item.description: - 60 cm under counter hood- extraction rate:200 m3/h- venting tube diameter: 12 cm- 3 speed positions- mechanic control- on/off light switch- number of lights: 1- washable grease filter- number of motors: 1- charcoal filter not included- optional air extraction or recirculation re-circulating hoods re-circulating hoods draw in steam and odour saturated air through a filter, then returning the treated air into the kitchen. if ducting for extraction is not possible, then recirculation may be another option. in this case, the air is drawn through a charcoal filter that removes cooking odours and steam, and the clean air is recirculated back into the kitchen. cooker hoods for recirculation are easy to install and are normally used in blocks of flats were installing ducts leading directly to the outside of the building can be difficult. extraction hoods draw in cooking fumes and trap vapours in a filter while expelling odours to the outside through a ventilation duct. you can expect to have to change the charcoal filter once or twice a year, depending on how often the cooker hood is used noise levelin today?s homes, the kitchen is a new focal point, which in turn has focused attention on noise levels produced by cooker hoods. over the last few years, the capacity of hoods has increased significantly, and sound-absorbing materials are increasingly being used in many of gorenje cooker hoods

item.title: Tramontina grano stainless steel wok, 32 cm, 62158320
item.description: - tri-ply body, with lid and long handle- the tri-ply base (stainless steel + aluminum + stainless steel) technology distributes heat evenly for faster cooking, which keeps food warm for longer and it also saves energy- highly durable stainless steel- very easy to clean and can be washed in the dishwasher on a daily basis- can be used on gas, electric, glass ceramic and induction cookers- maximum capacity for cooking is 3/4 of the total volume of the wokrecommendation for use:- use low or medium heat to prevent food from sticking to the bottom of the pot- when using the pot on a gas stove, the flame must not go higher than the bottom of the pot. if using the pot on a hot plate, make sure the hot plate is the same diameter or smaller than the pot- never heat up food by placing a pot which is the same width inside another. this is dangerous as it creates a vacuum seal, making it impossible to separate the pots- some starchy foods such as pasta and rice may stain the pot while cooking. these stains can be easily removed by wiping the pot with a damp cloth with lemon juice or vinegar- avoid leaving food in the pot for a long time; salt can cause stains too- to maintain the shine of your stainless steel pot, it is recommended that you only wash it using detergent and sponge- whenever possible, rinse the product with warm water after washing and dry immediately in order to keep its original shine as chloride and other substances contained in water can cause stains- do not place an empty pot on a heat source- only place hot cookware on heat-resistant surfaces- stainless steel handles heat up during cooking. wear oven mitts when handling- to remove the tramontina sticker from the pots, wipe with a damp cloth with ethanol and wash after
